entries.description: (Text-Only) ORDER PRECLUDING REMOVAL. Pending resolution of this matter, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that Respondents-along with their officers, agents, employees, and all persons acting in concert with them-shall not remove, transfer, or otherwise facilitate the removal of Petitioner from the jurisdiction of the United States District Court for the District of Minnesota pending further order of this Court. If Petitioner has been removed from the District of Minnesota, Respondent must immediately return Petitioner.A briefing schedule will follow. Ordered by Judge Jerry W. Blackwell on 2/6/2026 at 2:31 p.m. (CRD) (Entered: 02/06/2026)

(Text-Only) CLERK'S NOTICE OF INITIAL CASE ASSIGNMENT. Case assigned to Judge Jerry W. Blackwell per 3rd/4th Prisoner Alien Detainee Habeas list, referred to Magistrate Judge John F. Docherty. Please use case number 26-cv-1142 (JWB/JFD).Notice: All Nongovernmental Corporate Parties must file a Rule 7.1 Corporate Disclosure Statement. (MMP) (Entered: 02/06/2026)

PETITION for Writ of Habeas Corpus (filing fee $ 5, receipt number AMNDC-12644951) filed by Saabir Hassan Aadan. Filer requests summons issued. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit(s) Exhibit A. Notice to Appearbit, # 2 Exhibit(s) Exhibit B. Form I-589 Application for Asylum and Withholding of Removal, # 3 Civil Cover Sheet Civil Cover Sheet) (Bryan, Karen) (Entered: 02/06/2026)
NOTICE of Appearance by Karen Venice Bryan on behalf of Saabir Hassan Aadan. (Bryan, Karen) (Entered: 02/06/2026)
